basic_details.job_title: Calcutta High Court Stamp Vendor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Calcutta High Court Recruitment 2026: Calcutta High Court is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 0 Stamp Vendor posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as on 01/01/2026 (relaxation as per government norms)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years as on 01/01/2026 (relaxation as per government norms)

qualification.education_qualification: Madhyamik or equivalent examination from a recognized Board.
qualification.details: Stamp Vendor: Madhyamik or equivalent examination from a recognized Board.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to drop the application for the Stamp Vendor post?
faq.answer: The last date for dropping the application in the Drop Box is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted within this timeframe to be considered for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Stamp Vendor position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Stamp Vendor position is 18 years as of 1st January 2026. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Stamp Vendor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Stamp Vendor role is 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Stamp Vendor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the Madhyamik or an equivalent examination from a recognized Board to be eligible for the Stamp Vendor post.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Stamp Vendor position?
faq.answer: Selection for the Stamp Vendor position will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to prepare well for the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Where should candidates drop their applications?
faq.answer: Applications should be dropped in the Drop Box kept at the R.M. Section, Jalpaiguri Collectorate, Ground Floor. Ensure you submit it at the correct location.

faq.question: Q7. What are the timings for dropping the application?
faq.answer: The Drop Box will be open for applications from 10:00 A.M. to 4:00 P.M. on the specified dates, excluding holidays.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Stamp Vendor position?
faq.answer: The Stamp Vendor position is a contract-based job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.
